title: Soft Imprints
description: A client-side mod that adds dynamic block trails
body:
![Mountains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/779e75867bbff573f26e53a4b862be3d5dd4a81c.webp) ## **About** **Soft Imprints** is a highly configurable client-side mod that adds dynamic imprints to blocks as entities move across them ## **Features** - Fully client-side - Entities leave visible imprints when walking on supported blocks - Works with built-in profiles for snow, snow layers, sand, and red sand - In-game config screen with a live preview - Optional model-based imprint capture for more accurate shapes ## **Configuration** - Imprint check tick rate - Imprint appearance and rendering style - Cache and performance limits - Bounding-box or model-based imprint detection - Which entities can leave imprints - Which blocks can receive imprints - Individual profile and integration toggles ## **Addons**

## **Requirements** Fabric version requires Fabric API
